executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification blocked by stale external marketing independent verification (4.5-day-old artifact, verdict: fail, measurement: empty).
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh outcome evidence and rerun independent verification before whole-stack green can be declared.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing independent verification is stale and failing
findings.mechanism: marketing_loop_independent_verification.json is 4.5 days old, verdict=fail, measurement={}. Architecture-owned gates are green but the external owner loop has not produced fresh outcome evidence.
findings.root_cause: Marketing owner loop has not produced measurable primary-repo movement and has not rerun its independent verification.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence and rerun independent verification.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is clean — 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 errored
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows perfect runtime health. Prior-run errors (backlink-tracker, marketing-research-daily: 'interrupted by gateway restart') have self-cleared.
findings.root_cause: Architecture/runtime topology is coherent with no live drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain direct cron inspection as source of truth on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green — all architecture-owned gates pass
findings.mechanism: Loop integrity, health-monitor blocker localization, and shared market-intelligence consumption remain coherent. Both watchdog loops report OK.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining risk is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Persisted disabled job (marketing-pulse) is history-only, not a live blocker
findings.mechanism: One disabled entry exists in jobs.json history, but live Gateway topology shows 0 disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job removal/disable cleanup.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology.

findings.title: Health monitor shows 7 open issues — all external (docs escalations + marketing IV)
findings.mechanism: Open issues: marketing IV (stale), 6 docs-review escalations (root-readme maintainer address, sibling readme mismatch). None are architecture-owned blockers.
findings.root_cause: Docs quality review has open must-fix items; marketing IV is stale. Both are external to architecture runtime.
findings.recommended_fix: Docs owner loop should address the 6 open escalations. Marketing owner loop should refresh IV.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Refresh marketing independent verification with measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing IV is 4.5 days stale with verdict=fail. This is the sole blocker to whole-stack certification.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Resolve docs quality escalations (6 open items)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Health monitor carries 6 docs-review escalations. Not architecture-blocking but consumes watchdog attention.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears noise from health monitor, allowing focus on the remaining marketing blocker.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed audit against current live view: 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 errored. Prior-run transient errors (backlink-tracker, marketing-research-daily gateway-restart interruptions) self-cleared.
Identified that marketing_loop_independent_verification.json is 387,784s (~4.5 days) old — well past freshness threshold. Verdict remains fail with empty measurement.
All 20 live jobs enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 errored. Loop integrity confirms both watchdogs OK. Architecture-owned runtime gates are fully green.

independent_verification.method: direct openclaw cron list --json + stat-based artifact freshness cross-check + marketing IV verdict extraction
independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement (artifact is 4.5 days stale)

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing independent verification: 4.5-day stale artifact, verdict=fail, measurement=empty
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are fully green, but the external marketing owner loop has not produced fresh outcome evidence.

notes: Architecture green = architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; does not mean whole stack is green.

Prior-run transient errors (backlink-tracker, marketing-research-daily: gateway restart interruptions) self-cleared.
The sole remaining blocker is external: marketing IV 4.5 days stale with verdict=fail.
Persisted disabled job (marketing-pulse) is history-only; live runtime has 0 disabled jobs.
No architecture-owned repairs needed this run — runtime is coherent.
